idea-plugin.name: Vais Language Support
idea-plugin.description:
Vais language support for IntelliJ IDEA.

Features

  • Syntax highlighting with Vais single-character keywords
  • LSP-powered code completion (struct fields, methods, trait methods)
  • Go to definition (cross-module, import resolution)
  • Find references
  • Hover information with inferred types
  • Error diagnostics via LSP
  • Inlay hints for variable types
  • Signature help
  • Document symbols
  • Code actions
  • Code formatting (LSP-backed + fallback formatter)
  • Brace matching and auto-closing
  • Line/block comment toggle (Ctrl+/ and Ctrl+Shift+/)
  • Run configuration with target selection (native/JS/WASM)
  • Working directory and environment variable support
  • Debug configuration via vais-dap (DAP server)

Requirements

  • vais-lsp binary in PATH or configured location (for LSP features)
  • vais-dap binary in PATH or configured location (for debugging)
  • vaisc compiler in PATH or configured location (for run/debug)
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Code formatting support (LSP-backed with fallback formatter)
  • Brace matching and auto-closing for (), {}, [], <>
  • Line and block comment toggling
  • Run configuration: target selection (native/JS/WASM)
  • Run configuration: working directory and environment variables
  • Debug configuration: working directory support, source file mapping
  • Improved file chooser dialogs with project context

0.0.2

  • Enhanced LSP integration with document synchronization
  • Auto-start LSP server on .vais file open
  • DAP debug configuration support
  • Fixed createElement crash in parser definition
  • Expanded client capabilities (inlay hints, signature help, code actions)

0.0.1

  • Initial release
  • LSP client integration
  • Basic syntax highlighting
